Reviews Contact

Client Reviews

5.0/5 average rating from 8+ happy clients

What Our Clients Say

Real feedback from homeowners and businesses who trust Summit Roof Pros to get the job done right.

“After last spring's hail storm destroyed our 20-year-old roof in Park Hill, Summit Roof Pros guided us through the entire insurance process. They installed a beautiful Class 4 shingle roof that already survived this season's storms with no damage. The crew was meticulous about cleaning up every day.”

Mark T. Roof Replacement
Mar 15, 2025

“A wind storm tore off several shingles from our Lakewood home's roof. Summit had someone out the next day to tarp the area temporarily, then scheduled permanent repairs within the week. The color match is perfect - you can't tell where the damage was.”

Sarah K. Storm Damage Repair
Jan 22, 2025

“We wanted a metal roof for our new build in Highlands Ranch but were concerned about noise. Summit Roof Pros explained all the insulation options and installed a standing seam roof that's actually quieter than our old asphalt one during rain storms. Beautiful and functional!”

James and Lisa W. Metal Roofing
Nov 7, 2024

“Summit Roof Pros has maintained our LoDo office building's roof for three years now. Their preventative maintenance program caught a small membrane issue before it became a major leak. Professional crew that minimizes disruption to our tenants.”

Denver Properties LLC Commercial Roofing
Sep 18, 2024

“The new gutters Summit installed on our Capitol Hill Victorian look like they've always been there. They matched the original style perfectly while adding leaf guards that have reduced our cleaning needs dramatically. No more ice dams forming above our bedroom!”

Roberta C. Gutter Installation
Aug 3, 2024

“As a first-time homeowner in Aurora, I didn't know what to look for in roof condition. The Summit inspector spent an hour explaining everything, even showing me how to spot early warning signs in the attic. No pressure to sell unnecessary repairs - just honest advice.”

Thomas R. Roof Inspection
Jun 29, 2024

“After a tree branch damaged our roof in Littleton, Summit repaired just the affected area instead of pushing for a full replacement like another company did. The repair blends perfectly and was done in one afternoon. Will definitely call them first for any future roofing needs.”

Nancy P. Shingle Repair
May 11, 2024

“We manage 25+ properties across Denver and trust Summit Roof Pros for all our roofing needs. Their detailed inspection reports help us budget accurately, and they always complete work on schedule. Recently handled a complex membrane replacement at our Arvada complex flawlessly.”

Elite Property Management Commercial Roofing
Apr 5, 2024
Summit Roof Pros

Trusted roofing serving Denver, CO and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
